items.title: Bill to allow assisted dying in England and Wales set to fall as parliamentary time runs out
items.summary: The bill had proposed allowing adults with fewer than six months to live, to apply for an assisted death subject to the approval of two doctors and an expert panel
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. Is Said to Be Sending Kushner and Witkoff to Negotiations in Pakistan
items.summary: Vice President JD Vance will be on standby to travel to Pakistan to join the talks if progress is made, an American official said.

items.title: Man found guilty over birds of prey dumped outside Hampshire village shop
items.summary: James Kempster’s DNA was found on dead barn owl and kestrel rammed into door handles of volunteer store A man has been found guilty of possessing the bodies of wild birds of pre...
